topPros.title: catechin content adds real upside
topPros.explanation: That gives it a useful compound story beyond the near-empty nutrition label.

topPros.title: strong polyphenol reputation
topPros.explanation: The core appeal of green tea lives in its compounds and effects rather than classic nutrition composition.

topPros.title: nearly zero-calorie daily use
topPros.explanation: A huge practical advantage in a category judged more by effect than macros.

topCons.title: taste can be a barrier
topCons.explanation: Not everyone enjoys it enough to use consistently.

topCons.title: quality varies by source
topCons.explanation: The practical value depends somewhat on the product.

topCons.title: can be a bit fussier than grab-and-go drinks
topCons.explanation: A tiny practical downside, but not a serious one.

closing.summary: Green Tea has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
closing.useCaseNote: Best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
